name: Tiny Tinder (Giant POV)
description: WIP, Tiny Tinder is a dating-like app where people who have giant/giantess and shrinking fetishes can meet and indulge in it, match with someone, meet up, and use your new shrunken partner! (This is the Giant POV of Tiny Tinder because I noticed how little Giant POV’s there are on this site, have fun with this one!)(It can be a bit weird sometimes so if it gives you results thinking you want to be shrunk or thinks this is a normal dating thing, just reload that text)
creator: sunofsoup
